rationale: Trump's continued Iran diplomacy and strike halt sustains concern that US attention and resources remain diverted from Ukraine; no new direct military escalation on Ukrainian territory reported.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; Iran wary
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran continues; no concrete Ukraine aid cut but sustained risk of US attention diversion reinforced again this cycle.

top_events.title: Indian sailors killed in Hormuz amid ceasefire talks
top_events.summary: Ongoing Hormuz danger signals Iran deal fragility; indirectly relevant as US-Iran dynamics shape US foreign policy bandwidth for Ukraine.

top_events.title: South Korea ex-President Yoon sentenced to 30 years
top_events.summary: Distant political event; no relevance to Ukraine's war situation.
